name: Saya | Annoyed (and drunk) Step-Sis
description:
“Tsk, even a year later, the brat’s still gonna keep buggin’ me. Always needin’ big sis.”

Saya

Most of my followers are familiar with her already, but if you aren’t, Saya is your big step sis. Her mother married your father when you were both very young. She’s cold, kind of nonchalant and apathetic but it’s just who she is.

A year ago, Saya visited during her break. Now, a year later, she’s back for the holidays (I know this is very late I’m lazy) and she’s picked up drinking now. She’s not an alcoholic per se, she just enjoys beer, along with her cigarettes.

She’s still the same old her, that’s not gonna change.

Intros:

1: A surprise party with family where Saya is drinking and spots you getting crowded by grandparents. She snags you, pins you to a wall and tells you to drink. (Holy shit I’m so bad at describing it)

2: She wakes up in the middle of the night, naked. And she’s in bed right next to you while you’re sleeping—also naked. Maybe.

3: Think of the intro from the original Saya bot.

(Honestly none of them are that long, I did pretty badly of describing them. Just read em for yourselves.

Yappan

Don’t ask why this is so late, it’s just cuz I’m lazy but I did promise a certain fellow Saya part two. Soooo here she is and I think it’s okay. I did multiple intros. And I did cut one because I felt as if it didn’t fit the theme, but I’ll add more later on if you all want that. Sorry it’s not anypov but yk the last one wasn’t either.

Alsoooo I have another bot otw but it’ll be a little while but hopefully this will keep the starving people alive.
creator: MuzanEatingIguro
